allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\selfProject\\petLifeLog -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false -or $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.git' } | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\selfProject\\pawCareChart -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false -or $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.git' } | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\selfProject\\petLifeLog\\dev\\back\\petlifelog-backend\\src\\main\\java -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq '.java' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\selfProject\\pawCareChart\\dev\\backend\\src\\main\\java -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq '.java' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
